text: Which corrective work orders for equipment CWC04009 in year 2017 can be bundled in the next maintenance window? A bundle means that several work orders are executed in a short period, say in two weeks.

tasks.task_description: Fetch corrective work orders for CWC04009 in 2017
tasks.review: Task Status: Accomplished | retrieved corrective work orders | none

tasks.task_description: Bundle work orders with same scheduled dates for efficient processing.
tasks.final_answer:
No work orders found.  -> No work orders found. 
No work orders found for equipment CU02013.  -> No work orders found.
Hello  -> Hello
Hello, World  -> Multiple values exist
Just a sentence.  -> Just a sentence.
value  -> value
value1, value2  -> Multiple values exist
No data  -> No data
single value  -> single value
value1, value2  -> Multiple values exist
nestedValue  -> nestedValue
123  -> 123
true  -> true
null  -> No data available
No work orders found.  -> No work orders found.
```json
{
    "message": "No work orders found for equipment CU02013 in the specified date ranges."
}
```  -> No work orders found.
```json
{
    "key": "value"
}
```  -> value
```json
{
    "key1": "value1",
    "key2": "value2"
}
```  -> Multiple values exist
```json
{}
```  -> No data available
```json
[
    "single value"
]
```  -> single value
```json
[
    "value1",
    "value2"
]
```  -> Multiple values exist
```json
{
    "key": {
        "nestedKey": "nestedValue"
    }
}
```  -> nestedValue
```json
{
    "key": 123
}
```  -> 123
```json
{
    "key": true
}
```  -> true
```json
{
    "key": null
}
```  -> No data available
